title: F.C.C. Chair Threatens to Revoke Broadcasters’ Licenses Over War Coverage
summary_full: The comment from Brendan Carr came on the heels of a social media message from President Trump criticizing the news media’s coverage of the war with Iran.
summary_public: The comment from Brendan Carr came on the heels of a social media message from President Trump criticizing the news media’s coverage of the war with Iran.
